title: velaea scabrella
intro: Velaea scabrella, also known as Velaea scabrella, is a flowering plant that belongs to the family Boraginaceae. The plant is used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. It is valued for its health benefits, such as soothing skin irritations and reducing fever, as well as its ability to support respiratory health. Herbal preparations of Velaea scabrella can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which are used to harness its medicinal properties.
